description: Categorize Google Takeout location visits using geofences
sql: SELECT 'gtakeout' AS source, v.start_timestamp || '_' || REPLACE(v.place_name, ' ', '_') AS source_id, v.start_timestamp::TIMESTAMP AS arrived_at, v.end_timestamp::TIMESTAMP AS left_at, CASE WHEN v.start_timestamp IS NOT NULL AND v.end_timestamp IS NOT NULL THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (v.end_timestamp::TIMESTAMP - v.start_timestamp::TIMESTAMP)) / 60.0 ELSE NULL END AS duration_min, v.latitude, v.longitude, g.name AS geofence, g.category AS geofence_category, v.place_name, v.confidence FROM gtakeout.location_visits v LEFT JOIN shenas_system.geofences g ON shenas_system.haversine_m(v.latitude, v.longitude, g.latitude, g.longitude) <= g.radius_m AND v.latitude != 0 AND v.longitude != 0 WHERE v.type = 'visit' AND v.start_timestamp IS NOT NULL
